header.notes: Keep megamenu/search/cart/account logic. Match logo placement, nav style, and sticky behavior from the target design.

announcement.notes: Single-line promo bar. Keep any dismiss logic.

hero.notes: Match layout (full-bleed vs contained), overlay treatment, CTA button style. Keep slide/autoplay logic if present.

product-card.notes: Highest-impact component. Match image aspect ratio, hover behavior, price/title typography, badge and wishlist placement. Keep add-to-cart and routing logic exactly.

product-grid.notes: Match column counts and gaps at each breakpoint from the target design.

category-nav.notes: Match card shape (circle vs rounded rect) and label style.

footer.notes: Match column structure, link styling, payment/social icons area, newsletter block placement.

newsletter.notes: Keep form submit handler and validation. Match input/button styling.
